description: This file defines a React component for the Outcomes page of an insurance fraud investigation platform. It manages listing, filtering, and creating investigation outcomes, including UI elements like modals, filters, and tables. It interacts with backend APIs for data fetching and submission.

methods.name: loadData
methods.description: Fetches outcomes, claims, and investigators data from the API and updates component state.

methods.name: getClaimNumber
methods.description: Returns claim number for a given claim ID.

methods.name: getInvestigatorName
methods.description: Returns full name of investigator by their ID.

methods.name: getOutcomeBadge
methods.description: Returns badge style based on outcome type.

methods.name: getOutcomeLabel
methods.description: Returns human-readable label for an outcome type.

methods.name: handleCreate
methods.description: Handles the form submission to create a new outcome via API.
